description: Revel in the comfort of pure leather and look stylish in ease in this pair of wedged gladiator sandals from enroute. Pair it with western and ethnic wear, and look great both ways. This pair comes with a shoe bag to help you carry it around in ease.Heel: 1"UpperLeather straps on the forefoot, midfoot, spine of the heel and around the ankleLeather heel cup with a zipper at the back and ankle straps to hold the foot in placeErgonomically curved and padded footbedOutsoleDurable TPU outsole grooved on the forefoot and heel for absolute grip and tractionSandal careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
